alkylation reagent: alkylation in 10 mM iodoacetamide in the dark for 30 min.
alkylation concentration: alkylation in 10 mM iodoacetamide in the dark for 30 min.
cleavage agent: digested with 2 μg Trypsin at 37°C for 6 h
enrichment method: 100 μl (20 μL per sample) of Ni-NTA magnetics beads (QIAGEN)
fragmentation method: fragmented by higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: analyzed on an Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometry system
labeling: 100 μg HTR2B-β-arrestin-1-scFv30 protein was denatured in 2 M urea
